hero.title: Construction starts with the right decision. Make it clearly. Make it confidently.
hero.subtitle: Rasi is Saudi Arabia's digital marketplace for construction and design — connecting project owners with qualified contractors and engineers through a structured journey from project brief to professional award.
hero.intro: Choosing the right professional is the single most important decision in any construction or design project. On Rasi, you post your project with clear specifications, receive qualified offers from verified professionals, compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard — and award your decision through a documented workflow, instead of scattered messages and unverifiable referrals.
hero.microcopy: Post in minutes — no documents required to start.

howItWorks.title: From brief to award — in three steps.
howItWorks.afterAward: Once awarded, your project moves from the selection phase to execution — outside Rasi's scope. After the engagement closes, you can return to rate the awarded party, contributing to a stronger market for the next project owner.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Add project details, location, service type, estimated budget, and timeline. Upload drawings or photos if available.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Offers arrive from qualified contractors or engineers. Compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Ask questions, request clarifications, and award your decision. The contractual relationship begins directly between you and the awarded party.

trust.label: Our Foundation
trust.title: Trusted & Secure Platform
trust.verifiedProfilesDesc: Every contractor and engineer is thoroughly vetted with documented credentials, portfolio, and track record
trust.transparentTiersDesc: Clear classification with published criteria so you know exactly what each tier represents
trust.sideBySideDesc: Structured comparison tools to evaluate bids on price, timeline, experience, and ratings
trust.documentedJourneyDesc: Complete audit trail from project brief to award — every step tracked and recorded

twoSided.title: Two-Sided Marketplace
twoSided.headline: Built for both sides of every project.
twoSided.ownersDesc: Post your project and receive qualified offers — without the random search.
twoSided.contractorsDesc: Showcase your expertise to serious projects looking for your specialty.
twoSided.ownerBullet1: Post in minutes with clear specifications.
twoSided.ownerBullet2: Compare verified offers on one dashboard.
twoSided.proBullet2: Compete for projects that match your specialty.
twoSided.proBullet3: Grow your reputation with every project.

whyRasi.title: Why Rasi
whyRasi.constructionOnly: Construction-only — not a generic services directory
whyRasi.qualification: Qualification before competition — only verified professionals can submit offers
whyRasi.transparent: Transparent comparison — turning messages into measurable data
whyRasi.saudiMarket: Built for the Saudi market — designed around local contracting norms and regulatory context
whyRasi.microcopy: Post in minutes — no documents required to start.

ownerSection.headline: Stop searching alone. Let qualified professionals come to your project.
ownerSection.mainCopy: Whether you are building a villa, designing a space, finishing an office, renovating a home, or developing a commercial project — Rasi turns your idea into a structured project request that reaches the right contractors and engineers, and brings back comparable offers.
helpItems: Post your project in minutes, in a professional format.
Receive offers from professionals who have been verified.
Compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard.
Communicate with bidders inside a documented channel.
Award your decision confidently — with a clear record of the journey.
features: Manage all your projects in one place via the owner dashboard.
Receive instant notifications when new offers or updates arrive.
Access standard contract templates that help you contract with confidence.
Browse each contractor's or engineer's portfolio before deciding.
ownerSection.trustMessage: Rasi does not choose the executing party for you, does not guarantee execution outcomes, and does not monitor work quality after award. Our role is to prepare a better decision — with clearer information. You award, and you contract — we make sure you reach that moment with confidence and reliable data.

professionalSection.headline: Real projects are looking for your expertise.
professionalSection.mainCopy: If you are a licensed contractor or specialized engineer, Rasi gives you a structured channel to reach serious project owners. Instead of relying on relationships or random advertising, you build a verified professional profile and compete for the projects that match your specialty and area.
whyJoin: Access real projects with clear specifications.
A professional profile that showcases your portfolio, experience, and ratings.
Competition based on capability and record — not connections alone.
Progression across four trust tiers with transparently published criteria.
Build a measurable digital reputation in the construction sector.
Aligned with ZATCA e-invoicing and data protection standards.
professionalSection.contractorsCopy: Showcase your company, specializations, and contractor classification — and bid on execution projects within your scope. Qualification before competition means every project you see is from a serious owner.
professionalSection.engineersCopy: Whether you are an architect, interior designer, supervising engineer, or engineering office, present your specialty and bid on design, supervision, or consulting projects that match your experience.
growth: Complete your first projects on Rasi and build up your ratings.
Auto-progress to higher tiers when published criteria are met.
Establish a documented record that strengthens your candidacy for larger projects.
professionalSection.cta: Join as a Contractor or Engineer
professionalSection.microcopy: Joining requires completing your verification profile — only qualified professionals receive offers.

decisionJourney.headline: From brief to award — in three steps.
decisionJourney.step1Desc: Add project details, location, service type, estimated budget, and timeline. Upload drawings or photos if available.
decisionJourney.step2Desc: Offers arrive from qualified contractors or engineers. Compare price, timeline, track record, and ratings on one dashboard.
decisionJourney.step3Desc: Ask questions, request clarifications, and award your decision. The contractual relationship begins directly between you and the awarded party.
decisionJourney.afterAward: Once awarded, your project moves from the selection phase to execution — outside Rasi's scope. After the engagement closes, you can return to rate the awarded party, contributing to a stronger market for the next project owner.
decisionJourney.advantagesSubtitle: Sharply different from classifieds, WhatsApp groups, informal referrals, and generic directories.
decisionJourney.adv1Desc: Rasi is not a generic services directory or an open marketplace for every profession. Every feature — from the professional profile to the comparison dashboard — is engineered around the realities of construction, design, finishing, and renovation projects.
decisionJourney.adv2Desc: Offers appear on the platform only from professionals who have cleared profile, specialization, and experience review. Verification is the condition for entering the competition — not a marketing label awarded after sign-up.
decisionJourney.adv3Desc: We convert offers from fragmented WhatsApp conversations and phone calls into structured, comparable data on unified criteria. The decision becomes clearer, and the real differences actually surface.
decisionJourney.adv4Desc: From verification flows to communication patterns to professional classifications, Rasi is built on a real understanding of Saudi contracting norms, local contractor workflows, and the role of engineers in raising decision quality. We comply with the Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL), ZATCA e-invoicing, the E-Commerce Law, and applicable cybersecurity standards.

verificationTrust.whyCopy: Platform quality is not measured by registration counts, but by the quality of those allowed to compete. We designed a multi-stage process to raise the trust baseline, reduce decision ambiguity, and shield both sides from known operational risks.
reviewItems: Declared specialization and scope of work
Fit between professional and project type/area

whyMatters.title: Raises the trust baseline
whyMatters.desc: Every professional shown has already passed a documented review

whyMatters.title: Reduces decision ambiguity
whyMatters.desc: Owners compare verified, comparable professionals — not unknowns

whyMatters.title: Shields both sides
whyMatters.desc: Known operational risks reduced before the first offer is submitted

whoGets: Contractors — all trade types and classifications

tiers.name: Registered
tiers.desc: Completed registration and basic verification. Can browse projects and begin building a professional profile.

tiers.name: Qualified
tiers.desc: Complete profile with documented experience in declared specialty. Eligible to submit project offers.

tiers.name: Preferred
tiers.desc: Strong performance record and accumulated positive ratings. Higher visibility in search results.

tiers.name: Elite
tiers.desc: Sustained high performance, continuous commitment, and a documented track record on the platform. Highest trust level and priority in major project recommendations.

verificationTrust.noteCopy: Verification reduces randomness and improves comparison quality — but it does not guarantee execution outcomes. Contractual obligations, schedule adherence, and final work quality remain the responsibility of the awarded party.
verificationTrust.noteEmphasis: Rasi prepares the decision; it does not execute the project.

items.a: Rasi is Saudi Arabia's digital marketplace for construction and design. It connects project owners with qualified contractors and engineers, and organizes the decision journey from project posting to professional award.

No. Rasi is not a contracting company and does not execute construction work itself. Our role is to connect, verify, document, and structure the decision — the contractual relationship begins directly between the owner and the awarded party.

items.q: Does the platform monitor project execution?
items.a: No. Rasi's role ends at the moment of award. Execution, supervision, and quality assurance fall outside the platform's scope and remain the responsibility of the contracting parties.

Individuals, companies, and project-owning entities can post projects across construction, design, finishing, renovation, or commercial space development, provided they are at least 18 years old and have legal capacity.

items.q: Who can register as a service provider?
items.a: Licensed contractors, specialized engineers, and engineering offices — after completing the verification and qualification requirements relevant to the account type and specialty.

Yes. We apply a multi-stage process covering legal information, specialization, experience, and prior work. The trust level (Registered / Qualified / Preferred / Elite) is displayed on every professional profile.

items.q: Does the platform guarantee execution quality?
items.a: No. Verification, comparison, and documentation reduce risk — but execution outcomes remain the responsibility of the awarded party. This separation between the digital role and the execution role is intentional and clearly stated.

items.q: How do I choose the right offer?
items.a: Compare offers on the comparison dashboard based on: total price, timeline, professional record, prior ratings, clarity of scope, and communication quality before award.

items.q: Can I communicate with professionals before choosing?
items.a: Yes. The platform provides a structured communication channel for questions and clarifications before award — and every exchange is documented in the project context.

items.q: Can I upload drawings, photos, and files?
items.a: Yes. You can attach drawings, specifications, photos, or any files that help professionals understand the project and submit accurate offers.
Fees are published on the platform at the time of use and may change from time to time as Rasi may determine. For details, please refer to the Terms & Conditions.

items.q: How is my personal data handled?
items.a: We process your data in compliance with the Saudi Personal Data Protection Law (PDPL), and we do not share it with third parties except for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy or as required by law or formal request.

items.q: What happens if a dispute arises with the awarded party?
items.a: Execution disputes between parties are governed by their agreement and applicable Saudi laws. Rasi makes the on-platform message and document trail available as a reference tool, but is not a party to the dispute and bears no responsibility for it.

items.q: Can I withdraw my project before award?
items.a: Yes. You can withdraw your project at any time before award without obligations toward bidders, subject to any usage fees specified in the Terms.
If you are a project owner: click "Post Your Project." If you are a contractor or engineer: click "Join as a Professional" and complete your profile to reach the appropriate verification level.

partnersSection.headline: Building partnerships that raise the quality of the construction sector.
partnersSection.copy: We welcome strategic partnerships with engineering offices, qualified contractors, real estate developers, brokers, financing partners, technology providers, and construction-related service providers. Our shared goal is one: a trusted digital infrastructure that gets project owners to the right professional — and raises the efficiency of the sector as a whole.
partnersSection.who6: Training and capacity-building partners in the sector
partnersSection.why1Desc: Reach owners ready to contract — not casual browsers.
partnersSection.why2Desc: Visibility on a specialized platform that reinforces credibility.
partnersSection.why3Desc: Long-term collaboration opportunities across the construction value chain.
partnersSection.why4Desc: A direct contribution to a more transparent and organized construction market.
partnersSection.modelDesc: We respect the Saudi Competition Law and preserve strategic flexibility for both partnership sides.

contactSection.headline: Ready to start with confidence?
contactSection.copy: Whether you are a project owner looking for the right contractor or engineer, or a contractor or engineer looking for serious projects — the Rasi team is ready to guide you to the right next step. Send us a message and we will respond within one business day.
contactSection.ch4Value: Information Technology Integrated Solutions Co. — Riyadh, KSA
contactSection.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help you...
contactSection.submitSuccess: Message sent — we'll be in touch within one business day.

terms.clause_1: In these Terms, the following words and expressions shall have the meanings set against each, unless the context requires otherwise. "Platform" / "Rasi": the Rasi website and application together with all related services, features, and interfaces. "Operator": Information Technology Integrated Solutions Co., UNN 7054044669, the entity operating the platform. "User": any natural or legal person who registers on or uses the platform in any capacity. "Project Owner": a user who posts a project seeking a contractor or engineer. "Service Provider": a contractor, engineer, or engineering office registered on the platform to submit project offers. "Project": any request for construction, design, finishing, renovation, supervision, or comparable works posted on the platform. "Offer": any quotation or service proposal submitted by a service provider on a project. "Award": the project owner's decision to select a specific service provider. "Content": any text, images, files, drawings, or data submitted by users or appearing on the platform. "Fees": amounts the platform sets for specific services. "Law" / "Laws": laws and regulations in force in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. "Force Majeure": any event beyond reasonable control that makes performance impossible or unreasonably burdensome. "PDPL": the Saudi Personal Data Protection Law issued by Royal Decree No. M/19. "SCCA": the Saudi Center for Commercial Arbitration.
terms.clause_2: 2.1 By using the platform in any capacity — including registration, browsing, posting a project, or submitting an offer — you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these Terms in full. 2.2 If you use the platform on behalf of a company or legal entity, you represent and warrant that you are legally authorized to contract on its behalf. 2.3 If you do not agree to any provision of these Terms, you must immediately stop using the platform. 2.4 These Terms, together with the Privacy Policy and any other policies published on the platform, constitute a binding agreement and form an integral whole.
terms.clause_3: CORE CLAUSE. 3.1 The platform is a neutral digital intermediary whose sole role is to connect project owners with qualified service providers and provide a structured environment for posting projects, receiving offers, and comparing them. 3.2 The platform is not a party to any contract concluded between a project owner and a service provider, is not an agent for either, and bears no responsibility for contractual obligations between them. 3.3 The platform does not engage in contracting work, does not execute construction, design, or supervision activities, and does not directly provide engineering services. 3.4 The platform does not monitor project execution after award and does not supervise quality, timelines, or contractual obligations between parties. 3.5 Any verification or qualification is a risk-reduction measure only — not a warranty of any service provider's competence, integrity, or performance. 3.6 All decisions of selection, contracting, payment, execution, termination, or dispute are private matters between the project owner and the service provider. 3.7 The platform reserves the right to refuse, suspend, modify, or remove any content, account, project, or offer at any time without stated cause. 3.8 The platform provides no legal, engineering, financial, or insurance advice.
terms.clause_4: 4.1 The user must be at least eighteen years of age and have full legal capacity to contract under Saudi laws. 4.2 The user must provide true, accurate, complete, and current data at registration and at any time while using the platform. 4.3 The user is fully responsible for the confidentiality of login credentials and all activities conducted through the account, and must notify the platform immediately of any unauthorized use. 4.4 Creating more than one account for the same person or entity, impersonating others, or providing misleading information is prohibited. 4.5 Service providers must meet the licensing and professional classification requirements applicable under Saudi laws.
terms.clause_5: Project Owner Obligations: Provide an honest and complete description of the project, scope of work, budget, and timeline. Evaluate offers in good faith, and refrain from using the platform for non-serious price-fishing. Independently verify the suitability of the service provider before award, including reviewing licenses and credentials. Honor any agreement concluded with the awarded service provider and resolve disputes with them directly. Service Provider Obligations: Provide accurate information on licensing, classification, experience, and prior work. Honor submitted offers and respond to inquiries professionally and within a reasonable time. Respect the agreed scope of work and comply with applicable professional and architectural regulations. Refrain from any practice that undermines platform transparency or affects fair competition.
terms.clause_6: 6.1 The platform applies a multi-stage verification and qualification process ending in classification of service providers across four tiers: Registered, Qualified, Preferred, Elite. 6.2 The qualification and tier-progression criteria are published on the platform and are subject to change without prior notice. 6.3 Verification procedures include, but are not limited to, review of legal data, licensing, professional classification, prior work, profile completeness, and prior ratings. 6.4 Risk reduction is the sole purpose of verification. Verification does not provide any warranty of a service provider's competence, integrity, or performance. 6.5 The platform may downgrade, suspend, or terminate a service provider at any time if violations, complaints, or breaches are identified.
terms.clause_7: 7.1 A project owner may post projects on the platform provided the data submitted is accurate, true, and complete, and that the project is lawful under Saudi laws. 7.2 The platform may refuse any project that does not align with these Terms, applicable laws, or the nature of available services, without stated reason. 7.3 Offers submitted by service providers constitute a binding commitment to the project owner under the terms stated in the offer. 7.4 The platform does not interfere in setting prices, payment terms, or execution details between parties, and bears no responsibility for the accuracy or suitability of offers. 7.5 A project owner may withdraw a project before award, and a service provider may withdraw an offer before its acceptance, subject to any applicable usage fees.
terms.clause_8: 8.1 The platform charges fees for specific services, set and published on the platform from time to time as the Operator may determine. 8.2 The platform may amend the fee schedule, add new fees, or modify the payment mechanism at any time without prior notice. Continued use constitutes acceptance of new fees. 8.3 All fees are non-refundable except in cases the Operator expressly designates. 8.4 VAT and any other taxes due under Saudi laws are added to fees, and the Operator issues ZATCA-compliant electronic tax invoices. 8.5 Any payments between a project owner and a service provider take place outside the platform, and the platform bears no responsibility for their collection, guarantee, or any related dispute.
terms.clause_9: STRICT ENFORCEMENT. 9.1 Each user must conduct all correspondence, negotiation, exchange of offers, and award through the platform, for the duration of the project and until the engagement is formally closed. 9.2 Any user who has connected with another party through the platform is prohibited from circumventing the platform by any means, including: exchanging contact information outside official channels, offering to close the transaction outside the platform, offering or accepting discounts to bypass platform fees, or terminating a project on the platform with intent to complete it externally. 9.3 In case of breach, the platform may: (a) suspend or terminate the account immediately; (b) claim full fees plus damages assessed at no less than twice those fees; (c) claim all direct and indirect damages; (d) take all available legal actions. 9.4 This clause remains in force for twelve (12) months after the last interaction between the parties on the platform. 9.5 The user accepts that this clause is reasonable and necessary to protect the Operator's legitimate interest.
terms.clause_10: 10.1 All intellectual property rights of the platform — including the trade name 'Rasi,' logos, designs, code, interfaces, text, databases, and licenses — belong to the Operator or its licensors, and are protected under Saudi intellectual property laws. 10.2 Users may not copy, modify, distribute, publish, reverse-engineer, or commercially exploit any element of the platform without prior written permission from the Operator. 10.3 The user is granted a limited, personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to use the platform solely under these Terms. 10.4 Any suggestions, ideas, or feedback provided by the user to the Operator are deemed property of the Operator without compensation.
terms.clause_11: 11.1 The user retains intellectual property rights over content submitted to the platform (drawings, images, text, files), provided the user owns them or is licensed to use them. 11.2 Upon uploading any content to the platform, the user grants the Operator a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, transferable, sublicensable license to use, copy, modify, display, and distribute the content for purposes of operating, developing, and marketing the platform, to the extent permitted by Saudi law. 11.3 The user represents and warrants that uploaded content does not infringe any intellectual property rights, privacy, or laws, and does not contain prohibited or offensive material. 11.4 The Operator may delete or remove any content it deems to violate these Terms or applicable laws, without prior notice and without any compensation.
terms.clause_12: The user agrees not to engage in any of the following activities, each of which constitutes a material breach: Using the platform for any unlawful purpose or in violation of Saudi laws. Submitting false, misleading, or impersonated data. Circumventing or bypassing the platform to complete transactions externally (see Clause 9). Disrupting platform operation or attempting to breach it. Using bots, scripts, or non-standard means to extract platform data. Publishing offensive, defamatory, racist, pornographic, violent, or morally objectionable content. Harassing, disturbing, or threatening any other user. Posting content that infringes the intellectual property, privacy, or trade secrets of others. Contacting users outside the platform for marketing purposes without prior consent. Using the platform for money laundering, terrorism financing, or any internationally prohibited activity. Manipulating, purchasing, or submitting fake ratings.
terms.clause_13: 13.1 The Operator may suspend or terminate any account, or refuse service to any user, at any time, for any reason or without stated reason, at its sole and absolute discretion, and without prior notice. 13.2 Grounds for suspension or termination include, without limitation: breach of these Terms, abusive conduct, repeated complaints, circumvention, false data, or any reason the Operator considers justified. 13.3 The user is not entitled to any compensation arising from suspension or termination of the account, even if it results in lost opportunities or expected profits. 13.4 The user may terminate the account at any time by submitting a request to the support team. Provisions that survive termination (Intellectual Property, Non-Circumvention, Limitation of Liability, Dispute Resolution) remain in force. 13.5 After termination, the Operator may retain user data and correspondence for the period required by law or to protect its legal rights.
terms.clause_14: The user expressly acknowledges and agrees, to the maximum extent permitted by Saudi law: 14.1 The platform and all its content and services are provided 'AS-IS' and 'AS-AVAILABLE,' without any express or implied warranties of any kind, including warranties of fitness for a particular purpose, freedom from defects, continuity, accuracy, integrity, or non-infringement. 14.2 The Operator does not warrant that the platform will be free of errors, viruses, or interruptions, or that it is compatible with all devices and systems. 14.3 The Operator provides no warranty as to the quality, integrity, competence, or conduct of service providers registered on the platform, even after they pass the verification and qualification process. 14.4 The Operator provides no warranty that platform use will lead to specific results, conclusion of contracts, or any defined economic benefit. 14.5 Any decision the user makes based on platform information is at the user's full personal responsibility.
terms.clause_15: LIABILITY CAP — READ CAREFULLY. 15.1 To the maximum extent permitted by Saudi law, the Operator, its affiliates, employees, agents, or licensors shall not be liable for any indirect, consequential, incidental, special, or punitive damages, including without limitation: loss of profit, loss of opportunity, moral damages, loss of reputation, or loss of data. 15.2 In any event, the Operator's total cumulative liability to any user, for all claims combined, shall not exceed the lesser of: (a) the total fees actually paid by the user to the platform during the six months preceding the cause of action, or (b) five hundred (500) Saudi Riyals. 15.3 The liability limitations apply across all theories of liability — contract, tort, negligence, warranty, or otherwise — even if the Operator has been advised of the possibility of such damages. 15.4 These limitations do not apply where liability cannot lawfully be excluded under mandatory Saudi laws.
terms.clause_16: 16.1 The user shall defend, indemnify, and hold harmless the Operator and all its affiliates from any claims, losses, damages, costs, or expenses (including reasonable attorney's fees) arising out of or relating to: (a) the user's use of the platform in violation of these Terms or applicable laws; (b) any content the user submits or uploads; (c) any breach of the user's representations, warranties, or obligations; (d) any dispute between the user and another user or third party; (e) any infringement of third-party rights, including intellectual property or privacy rights. 16.2 The Operator may assume defense and control of any such claim, and the user shall cooperate fully.
terms.clause_17: 17.1 The Operator shall not be liable for any delay or failure to perform its obligations resulting from a force majeure event, including without limitation: natural disasters, wars, civil unrest, strikes, pandemics, telecommunications or power outages, cyberattacks, governmental decisions, or any exceptional event beyond reasonable control. 17.2 If force majeure continues for more than thirty (30) days, the Operator may suspend or terminate services without bearing any liability.
terms.clause_18: KEY CLAUSE. 18.1 These Terms are governed by and interpreted in accordance with the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. 18.2 Any dispute arising out of or in connection with these Terms, including validity or termination, shall be referred exclusively to arbitration under the Arbitration Rules of the Saudi Center for Commercial Arbitration (SCCA) in force at the time the arbitration request is filed. 18.3 The seat of arbitration shall be Riyadh, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. The number of arbitrators is one, appointed by the SCCA in accordance with its rules. 18.4 The language of arbitration shall be Arabic; submissions in English may be accepted without translation at the tribunal's discretion. 18.5 The arbitral award shall be final, binding, non-appealable, and enforceable in any competent court. 18.6 The user expressly waives the right to file or join any class action or representative action. 18.7 Notwithstanding the above, the Operator may resort to the competent courts for injunctive or preliminary relief.
terms.clause_19: 19.1 The Operator may modify these Terms at any time, at its sole discretion, by posting the updated version on the platform. 19.2 Continued use of the platform after publication of modifications constitutes the user's express acceptance of them. 19.3 If the user does not agree to the modifications, the user must terminate the account immediately and stop using the platform.
terms.clause_20: If any provision of these Terms is found invalid or unenforceable by a competent court or arbitral tribunal, such finding shall not affect the validity and enforceability of the remaining provisions, which shall continue in full force and effect.
terms.clause_21: These Terms, together with the Privacy Policy and any other policies published on the platform, constitute the entire agreement between the user and the Operator, and supersede all prior agreements or understandings, oral or written, on the same subject.
terms.clause_22: 22.1 The user shall direct any notice to the Operator through the official contact channels published on the platform. 22.2 Publication on the platform, notification to the registered email, or in-app notification constitutes valid service of notice and produces full legal effect from the date of publication or delivery.
terms.clause_23: The user may not assign any rights or obligations under these Terms to any third party without prior written consent of the Operator. The Operator may assign its rights or obligations, in whole or in part, to any party of its choice without need for user consent.
terms.clause_24: These Terms are issued in Arabic and English. In case of any conflict or difference in interpretation between the two versions, the Arabic version shall be the authoritative and binding reference.
terms.arabicContent:
RASI │ راسي
السوق الرقمي للبناء والتصميم في المملكة
الشروط والأحكام
الوثيقة ٢ من ٣ · حماية قصوى · متوافقة مع الأنظمة السعودية
تشغيل: شركة إنفورميشن تيكنولوجي إنتجريتد سلوشنز
الرقم الوطني الموحد: ٧٠٥٤٠٤٤٦٦٩ · الرياض · ٢٠٢٦

اتفاقية ملزِمة — يُرجى القراءة بعناية
تُشكِّل هذه الشروط والأحكام اتفاقية قانونية ملزِمة بينك وبين المُشغِّل. باستخدامك راسي بأي صورة (التسجيل، التصفح، طرح المشاريع، تقديم العروض، أو غير ذلك)، فإنك تُقر بقراءتها وفهمها والموافقة عليها بالكامل.
آخر تحديث: ٢٠٢٦ · يسري من تاريخ النشر.

البنود:
١) التعريفات
٢) قبول الشروط
٣) دور المنصة وحدودها
٤) أهلية المستخدم والتسجيل
٥) فئات المستخدمين والتزاماتهم
٦) التحقق والتأهيل
٧) طرح المشاريع والعروض
٨) الرسوم والمدفوعات
٩) عدم التحايل
١٠) الملكية الفكرية
١١) محتوى المستخدم والترخيص
١٢) الأنشطة المحظورة
١٣) تعليق وإنهاء الحساب
١٤) إخلاء المسؤولية والضمانات
١٥) تحديد المسؤولية
١٦) التعويض
١٧) القوة القاهرة
١٨) القانون الحاكم وحل النزاعات
١٩) تعديل الشروط
٢٠) انفصال البنود
٢١) الاتفاقية الكاملة
٢٢) الإشعارات والمراسلات
٢٣) التنازل
٢٤) اللغة

مرتكزات قانونية رئيسية:
- دور المنصة محصور في تسهيل الربط.
- المنصة ليست مقاولاً ولا مشرفاً ولا ضامناً للنتائج.
- بند عدم التحايل يُطبَّق بصرامة.
- المسؤولية محددة بأقصى ما يسمح به النظام السعودي.
- تسري أنظمة المملكة، والتحكيم عبر المركز السعودي للتحكيم التجاري في الرياض.

نهاية الوثيقة الثانية — الشروط والأحكام.
راجع الوثيقة الثالثة — سياسة الخصوصية.

RASI │ Rasi
Saudi Arabia's Digital Marketplace for Construction & Design
Terms & Conditions
Document 2 of 3 · Maximum Shield · Saudi Law-Compliant
Operated by Information Technology Integrated Solutions Co.
Unified National Number: 7054044669 · Riyadh, KSA · 2026

BINDING AGREEMENT — READ CAREFULLY
These Terms & Conditions constitute a binding legal agreement between you and the Operator. By using Rasi in any manner (registration, browsing, posting, offers, or otherwise), you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these Terms in full.
Last updated: 2026 · Effective from publication date.

Clauses:
1. Definitions
2. Acceptance of Terms
3. Platform Role and Limitations
4. User Eligibility and Registration
5. User Categories and Obligations
6. Verification and Qualification
7. Project Posting and Proposals
8. Fees and Payments
9. Non-Circumvention
10. Intellectual Property
11. User Content and License
12. Prohibited Activities
13. Account Suspension and Termination
14. Disclaimers and Warranties
15. Limitation of Liability
16. Indemnification

18. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
19. Modifications to Terms
20. Severability
21. Entire Agreement
22. Notices and Communications
23. Assignment
24. Language

Core legal points:
- Platform role is limited to facilitating connections.
- Platform is not a contractor, supervisor, or guarantor of outcomes.
- Non-circumvention is strictly enforced.
- Liability is limited to the maximum extent permitted by Saudi law.
- Saudi law applies and disputes are resolved under SCCA arbitration (Riyadh seat).

End of Document 2 — Terms & Conditions.
See Document 3 — Privacy Policy.

hero.headline: We are restructuring the moment construction decisions begin.

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.headline: Digital Infrastructure for Better Construction Decisions
whoWeAre.description: Rasi is a Saudi digital platform purpose-built to connect project owners with qualified contractors and engineers across construction, design, finishing, and renovation. We believe the single most consequential moment in any project is the moment of choosing the executing party — it determines quality, cost discipline, and error rates. Rasi is the digital infrastructure that organizes that moment.

whatDelivers.title: Services designed to support the contracting decision — before execution begins.
summaryItems: A structured digital environment for posting projects and receiving offers from qualified parties.
Transparent comparison on one dashboard: price, timeline, track record, ratings.
A four-tier trust system with publicly published criteria: Registered, Qualified, Preferred, Elite.
Documentation of the decision journey — from brief to award.

services.title: Project Posting
services.description: We help project owners present their request professionally: project type, location, scope of work, estimated budget, timeline, and supporting files. The clearer the brief, the more accurate the offers.

services.title: Qualified Proposals
services.description: Instead of random outreach, your project reaches contractors and engineers whose specialization matches the work, so the offers you receive are worth comparing.

services.title: Structured Comparison
services.description: A unified comparison dashboard surfaces the real differences between offers: total price, timeline, track record, prior ratings, and profile completeness.

services.title: Verification & Qualification
services.description: Contractor and engineer profiles are reviewed against published criteria: legal information, specialization, prior work, and fit with the project type. Verification is the condition for competing — not a marketing label.

services.title: Structured Communication
services.description: In-platform messaging supports questions, clarifications, and detail reviews before award — all conversations are documented in the project context.

services.title: Documentation & Contracts
services.description: Tools to document scope, offers, and correspondence, plus support for clear contract drafting before execution begins. Documentation reduces disputes downstream.

services.title: Ratings & Reputation
services.description: After the engagement closes, ratings build a clear professional record for contractors and engineers — equipping future owners to make better-informed decisions.

whatIsNot.title: What Rasi Is Not
items: Does not execute construction work directly.
Does not supervise execution or monitor its quality.
Does not guarantee project outcomes — the contractual relationship remains between the owner and the awarded party.

vision.title: Vision
vision.description: To be the most trusted digital infrastructure in Saudi Arabia for organizing the construction professional selection decision.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: To enable project owners to reach qualified options, and serious contractors and engineers to reach real opportunities, through a platform founded on verification, transparency, and fair comparison.

ourStory.title: Our Story
ourStory.description: Rasi began from a clear market reality: project owners struggling to find trustworthy professionals and falling back on personal referrals; serious contractors missing the right opportunities; and qualified engineers lacking a clean channel to display their expertise. We built Rasi not as a directory of names, but as an operating layer that converts random search into a structured decision.
ourStory.description2: We work in service of Saudi Vision 2030, which positions construction and housing as strategic priorities, and we contribute to sector efficiency through a digital tool that respects local regulations, reinforces transparency, and reduces transaction friction.
ourStory.quote: We convert random search into a structured decision.

items.title: Professionalism
items.description: Professionalism in how projects and profiles are presented.

items.title: Quality
items.description: Quality in the qualification of professionals.

items.title: Neutrality
items.description: We do not recommend a specific party; we equip the owner to choose.

items.title: Regulatory commitment
items.description: We respect Saudi laws across everything we do.

about.tagline: Rasi — Saudi Arabia's digital marketplace for construction and design. We organize the decision journey from brief to award.
